alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaled global commercial operations and transformation programs, owns product requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation
alignments.job_requirement: Own end-to-end product strategy for real-time and post-transaction monitoring, rule design, alert optimisation, workflow automation, and client-specific risk controls

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient in SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries/CTEs, window functions); writes BigQuery queries directly to pull and shape own data; builds Looker dashboards; advanced Excel/Sheets; designs and directs AI/LLM agents for production systems with evaluation methodology and benchmarking
alignments.job_requirement: Optimise monitoring rules and thresholds to improve detection quality and significantly reduce false positives; data-driven mindset with ability to analyse transaction data and rule performance

alignments.candidate_evidence: Scaled global commercial operations across multiple functions at Google; experience with Salesforce administration and partnering with engineering on feature requests; directs LLM coding agents on cross-functional production systems
alignments.job_requirement: Work cross-functionally with Risk, Compliance, Operations, Data, and Engineering teams; translate regulatory and risk requirements into scalable product solutions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at scale; led transformation programs; experience in Commercial Operations (translates to Revenue Operations: territory management, reporting cadence, control frameworks); designs and specs automated systems with AI/agentic tooling
alignments.job_requirement: Build scalable, automated systems in regulated environments while balancing risk, operational efficiency, and customer experience

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial Operations background managing territory budgets and merchant/customer operations; led global scaling and optimization initiatives; no direct fraud/AML case-management experience documented
alignments.job_requirement: Partner closely with Risk Operations to optimise alert triage, case management, and investigator productivity; design client-specific risk controls for large and complex merchants

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking and calibration; applies AI to work smarter and solve problems
alignments.job_requirement: Identify opportunities to leverage AI and advanced analytics to improve detection accuracy and reduce manual operational effort

gaps.gap: No direct fraud, AML, or transaction monitoring product experience; domain is payments/fintech risk infrastructure, not commercial/revenue operations
gaps.mitigation: Strong data, SQL, analytics, and cross-functional execution foundation transfers; AML/fraud rules and case-management patterns can be learned with embedded risk/compliance guidance; eight-year track record of navigating complex regulated environments (Google Services) demonstrates regulatory fluency

gaps.gap: Limited documented exposure to case-management or investigator-workflow tooling, or AML/fraud-detection platform administration
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has designed and optimized complex multi-stakeholder workflows (global Commercial Ops); Salesforce admin and partnering with engineers show ability to learn operational platforms; can accelerate on domain via on-the-job mentoring from Risk/Ops teams

gaps.gap: No stated background in machine learning or advanced analytics model governance; preferred qualification listed in JD
gaps.mitigation: Candidate actively learns Python (data-analysis/pandas); designs AI/agentic evaluation methodology and benchmarking; not a production ML engineer role; can partner with Data team on advanced-analytics upskilling

output.level_rationale: Senior PM role requires 6+ years PM experience. JD emphasizes end-to-end product ownership, cross-functional leadership across Risk/Compliance/Ops/Data/Eng, and regulatory navigation in scaled fintech. Title + scope maps to L5 senior IC in Google ladder. no manager-of-managers signal present, ruling out L6.
output.summary: Candidate brings eight years of scaled product operations and transformation experience with strong data/SQL/analytics foundation and proven ability to design cross-functional systems in regulated environments. Core gap is domain depth—no direct fraud/AML/transaction-monitoring ownership—but Commercial Operations background, data-query proficiency, and AI/agentic-tooling design address core PM responsibilities. Risk-product strategy differs from commercial-ops strategy; manageability depends on embedded mentoring and domain access during ramp.
uncertainties: Candidate's Commercial Operations experience at Google and its specific regulatory/compliance scope relative to fintech fraud/AML governance not detailed; level of intersection unclear
Depth of Salesforce admin and case-management tooling experience not specified; relevance to Airwallex investigation workflows unknown
Company stage and team maturity at Airwallex not stated in JD; timeline for domain ramp-up dependency unknown
